intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy — QC, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, clustering, and UMAP visualization.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan:

input.title: scanpy QC + clustering for GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: Standard scanpy workflow: QC filtering → normalization → HVG selection → dimensionality reduction (PCA/UMAP) → clustering, with key diagnostic plots.

steps.title: Load sample from combined dataset
steps.description: Extract the first sample (Patient_145_Day0) from the registered h5ad file.

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Add n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito to obs; identify and flag low-quality cells.

steps.title: Filter cells
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or pct_mito > 0.20 (standard thresholds).

steps.title: Normalize and log-transform
steps.description: normalize_total(1e4) + log1p for library-size normalization and stabilization.

steps.title: Select highly variable genes (HVG)
steps.description: Identify top variable genes for dimensionality reduction.

steps.title: PCA and neighbors
steps.description: Compute PCA (n_comps=50), then k-nearest neighbors graph.

steps.title: UMAP and Leiden clustering
steps.description: Embed into 2D UMAP; cluster with Leiden algorithm (resolution=0.5).

steps.title: Generate diagnostic plots
steps.description: QC before/after filtering, HVG selection, PCA variance, UMAP colored by cluster.

assumptions: Using the registered GSE192391 h5ad dataset as input.
Leiden clustering resolution = 0.5 (sensible default for exploratory clustering).
Species is Homo sapiens (human); using 'MT-' prefix for mitochondrial genes.
Output: processed .h5ad object + diagnostic plots (QC, HVG, PCA variance, UMAP clusters).
